resources.string: Your current app version is %s, however an update is available to version %s.
The update is now being downloaded, please do not turn off your device.
Download finished. By pressing the button below, you will be redirected to the installation window.\nOnce the installation has completed, you will be redirected to the app.
Welcome to the Praxtour Update Manager!
If an update is detected by the system, it will be automatically installed. To open the app, please press the button below.

In order to install the newest version of the Praxtour app, please allow the Update Manager to install packages on this device.\n\nAfter pressing the button below, the system will ask you to toggle that permission. Once it is ON, you may need to press the ◀ symbol to return to this screen.

It seems you have not granted the update manager the permission to install packages on this device. You will not be able to continue using the Praxtour app while the update is not installed.\nIf you believe that you have granted the necessary permissions and are seeing this message, please contact us at service@praxtour.com.
